enter.speaker: narrator
enter.text: A thin figure sits at the dock's end, legs dangling over the dark water. She does not startle when you approach. She was waiting.

mira-caught.speaker: mira
mira-caught.text: You found me. Faster than most. I expected another hour at least.

choices.text: Why did you steal from me?
Join me. You are quick enough to be useful.

return-half.speaker: mira
return-half.text: Half. I need the rest more than you do. Take it or leave it.

return-half-done.speaker: mira
return-half-done.text: Do not look at me like that. I have slept under a dock for two weeks. Morality is a luxury that requires a roof.

choices.text: Come with me. I could use someone quick.

why-steal.speaker: mira
why-steal.text: Because I am hungry, and you looked rich. You are not rich. I apologize. Here.

why-steal-done.speaker: mira
why-steal-done.text: I came south from Ironveil when the mine went silent. No work. No coin. No one hires a girl with fast hands for anything honest. So the hands stay fast.

choices.text: Then use those hands for something that matters. Join me.
Keep the gold. You need it.

keep-gold.speaker: mira
keep-gold.text: ...You are strange. Most people who catch a thief are not kind about it. I will remember this.

join-offer.speaker: mira
join-offer.text: You want a thief at your back. That is either very smart or very stupid. I have not decided which. But I owe you, and debts sit heavier than gold. Fine. I am in.

join-done.speaker: mira
join-done.text: One rule. If we find treasure, I get first look. Not first pick — first look. A girl has to window-shop.

leave-alone.speaker: mira
leave-alone.text: Fair enough. If you change your mind, I will be here. Nowhere else to go.
